condition.description: Defines an optional condition that must be met for the IAM policy binding to apply, expressed as a logic expression.

member.description: Specifies the identity to be granted the IAM role, such as a user, service account, or group. Must follow the format `user:user@example.com`, `serviceAccount:service-account-name@project-id.iam.gserviceaccount.com`, or similar.

org_id.description: The ID of the organization where the IAM policy will be applied; must be a valid organization ID.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member within the organization. Must be in the format roles/{role_name}.
